'''nachongo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyanophyll|cyanophyll]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-ch-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyanophyll|cyanophyll]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| nachongo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:næchengeth|næchengeth]] || [[word:næchengej|næchengej]] || [[word:næchengesh|næchengesh]] || [[word:næchenge|næchenge]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nachochongoth|nachochongoth]] || [[word:nachochongoj|nachochongoj]] || [[word:nachochongosh|nachochongosh]] || [[word:nachochongo|nachochongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nachongoth|nachongoth]] || [[word:nachongoj|nachongoj]] || [[word:nachongosh|nachongosh]] || [[word:nachongo|nachongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nachofngofth|nachofngofth]] || [[word:nachofngofj|nachofngofj]] || [[word:nachofngofsh|nachofngofsh]] || [[word:nachofngof|nachofngof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nachongotho|nachongotho]] || [[word:nachongojo|nachongojo]] || [[word:nachongosho|nachongosho]] || [[word:nachongoko|nachongoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nachongoth|nachongoth]] || [[word:nachongoj|nachongoj]] || [[word:nachongosh|nachongosh]] || [[word:nachongo|nachongo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nachongothol|nachongothol]] || [[word:nachongojol|nachongojol]] || [[word:nachongoshol|nachongoshol]] || [[word:nachongokol|nachongokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nachongoothotho|nachongoothotho]] || [[word:nachongoojojo|nachongoojojo]] || [[word:nachongooshosho|nachongooshosho]] || [[word:nachongooko|nachongooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nachongothon|nachongothon]] || [[word:nachongojon|nachongojon]] || [[word:nachongoshon|nachongoshon]] || [[word:nachongokon|nachongokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nachongothooro|nachongothooro]] || [[word:nachongojooro|nachongojooro]] || [[word:nachongoshooro|nachongoshooro]] || [[word:nachongokooro|nachongokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|307a66b}}
